steps.title: S3, CloudFront, and TypeScript Predict Delete Marker Resolution · Theory Delete Marker Resolution
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory TypeScript file-delivery team handles case 3272 during a AWS SDK v3 dependency canary. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to narrow versioning state and require version-specific retention and restore evidence; retain keyboard and screen-reader progress, cancellation, error, and recovery evidence; then deliver a duplicate or reordered event and prevent duplicate stakeholder effect. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. Node and AWS SDK packages, networks, S3, CloudFront, KMS, IAM, WAF, PostgreSQL, credentials, host state, handle and stream checks, load, faults, restore, billing, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates.
